single_track_execution.description: Single owner executes one bounded track and returns one primary result.

coordinated_multi_track_execution.description: One owner coordinates multiple domain tracks and integrates outputs.

stage_gated_delivery.description: Progression is gated by explicit review/approval checkpoints.

exploratory_to_deterministic_conversion.description: Start with exploration, then compile stable governed contracts for deterministic execution.

pipeline_crystallization_loop.description: Explore the work, crystallize the stable shape into a pipeline, then freeze it for reproducible execution.

capability_lifecycle_procedure.description: Discover, normalize, register, reconcile, activate, observe, refresh, and retire governed capabilities under a shared lifecycle skeleton.

templates.description: High-stakes work requiring explicit checkpoint gates.
Use exploration before deterministic governed execution; this is the pre-pipeline crystallization path.
Convert an exploratory mission into a stable pipeline artifact, then freeze the stable execution shape.
Use the shared capability lifecycle skeleton to scan, normalize, register, reconcile, and refresh provider/gateway/platform capabilities.
Cross-system work requiring a coordinated owner and delegated specialists.
Decision-support missions start interactive (stakeholder 1-on-1s, hypothesis divergence, rehearsal) and end producing governed evidence artifacts (readiness_matrix / dissent-log / heuristic-entry).
Customer-facing missions (requirements elicitation, discovery, kickoff) route through stage-gated delivery so the transcript → draft → review → customer signoff sequence is explicit.

Platform onboarding missions (organization integration, secrets rotation, adapter registration) route through strict stage gates — cross_system_change delivery, SECURITY_READY and ARCHITECTURE_READY required, because these touch governance-scope config.
Default workflow for straightforward bounded work.
